scripts.build: pnpm run build:shared && pnpm run build:vscode && pnpm run build:chrome
scripts.build:shared: pnpm exec tsc -p packages/shared-protocol/tsconfig.json && pnpm exec tsc -p packages/text-segmentation/tsconfig.json
scripts.build:chrome: pnpm exec esbuild apps/chrome-extension/src/service-worker.ts apps/chrome-extension/src/content-script.ts apps/chrome-extension/src/popup.ts apps/chrome-extension/src/options.ts --bundle --format=esm --target=chrome120 --outdir=apps/chrome-extension/dist --loader:.html=text && node scripts/copy-chrome-assets.mjs
